en.extract:
The Pirre warbler (Basileuterus ignotus) is a species of bird in the family Parulidae.
It is found in the borderline area of Panama and Colombia (Serranía del Darién and Serranía de Pirre).
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.
It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''Pirre warbler''' ('''''Basileuterus ignotus''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Parulidae]].
It is found in the borderline area of [[Panama]] and [[Colombia]] ([[Serranía del Darién]] and [[Serranía de Pirre]]).
Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.
It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].
